details.productUrlName: Aurora Shifter Extended Art Ripple Foil

customAttributes.description:
Whenever Aurora Shifter deals combat damage to a player, you get that many E.
At the beginning of combat on your turn, you may pay EE. When you do, Aurora Shifter becomes a copy of another target creature you control, except it has this ability and "Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, you get that many E."
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item with an estimated shipping date of 6/14/2024. Please keep in mind card details, including rarity and card name, may change up until release date as information is updated.
